reviews.comment:
No se puede pagar con la app ypf, por lo que no podes obtener descuento, no te pueden cargar puntos serviclub, y no hay nafta super, todo por un "hackeo". Todos los años igual.

(Translated by Google)
You can't pay with the YPF app, so you can't get a discount, you can't add Serviclub points, and there's no premium gasoline, all because of a "hack." It's the same every year.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11264551123214888728/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNCa19EaTRBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Excelente atención. Solo me encontré con un inconveniente. Cargue el 8/12 y hoy 17/12. Desde el 8 que no tienen sistema. No pueden hacerme ticket y no puedo sumar puntos en serviclub. A quien debo solicitarle un comprobante (que debo rendir como viatico) y la acreditación de puntos?

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service. I only encountered one problem. I loaded fuel on December 8th and today, December 17th, their system has been down since the 8th. They can't give me a receipt and I can't accumulate points in Serviclub. Who should I contact to request a receipt (which I need to submit as travel expenses) and to have the points credited?
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11264551123214888728/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNCbElLN25RRRAB
